title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: November 10, 2022
summary: November 10, 2022: Over the past week, the sea ice has continued to increase but at a lower rate from last week, of 5.15% , from the level on 11/03/2022 of 8.887 M km 2 to 9.370 M km 2 for this week. title: Volitar!
summary: In which I scrap an entire show to play the Juneau-based Volitar project instead. Enjoy the ride.

title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 7 November, 2022
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 7 November, 2022 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
